cases.prompt: My OrderController has 150 lines creating orders, charging payment, and sending email — how should I restructure it?
cases.expect: recommends extracting an Action/Service, names SRP, keeps controller thin

cases.prompt: I have three places building the same complex invoice query — what pattern fits?
cases.expect: suggests a Repository or query object to encapsulate the repeated query, references DRY

cases.prompt: Payment handling switches on provider type inside the service — how do I make this extensible?
cases.expect: recommends a Strategy pattern bound by interface, references OCP
